description: South Bow Corporation operates as an energy infrastructure company. It operates through three segments: Keystone Pipeline System, Marketing, and Intra-Alberta & Other. The Keystone Pipeline System segment consists of the company's main liquids pipeline network, which transports crude oil from Hardisty, Alberta, to key U.S. markets including Wood River, Patoka, Illinois, Cushing, Oklahoma, and the Gulf Coast.
